intent: From-log oracle: execve-heavy slice. A real audit.log slice captured with a known execve rule. The cost --from-log reader should reproduce these per-key counts exactly.

rules.line: -a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S execve -F auid>=1000 -F auid!=unset -k wc_s4_execve_short

from_log.note_kernel_4_18: execve events: SYSCALL + EXECVE + CWD + 2xPATH (exe + dynamic linker) + PROCTITLE. 2 PATH records per event (executable + /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2).
